CREATE TABLE listeners (id INT PRIMARY KEY, address VARCHAR(255), state INT);
INSERT INTO listeners (id, address, state) VALUES (1, '127.0.0.1:7780', 0);
INSERT INTO listeners (id, address, state) VALUES (2, '192.168.1.1:8080', 1);
SELECT * FROM listeners WHERE state = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listeners WHERE state = 0;
SELECT address FROM listeners WHERE state = 1 UNION SELECT address FROM listeners WHERE state = 0;
SELECT address, state FROM listeners WHERE state IN (SELECT state FROM listeners WHERE address LIKE '127.%');
DELETE FROM listeners WHERE id = 2;
SELECT http_listen_host('127.0.0.1:7780', 0);
SELECT http_listen_host('127.0.0.1:7780', 1);
SELECT http_listen_host('127.0.0.1:7780', 2);
CALL http_listen_host('192.168.1.1:8080', 0);
CALL http_listen_host('192.168.1.1:8080', 1);
SELECT (SELECT http_listen_host(address, 0) FROM listeners WHERE id = 1) AS listener_state;
SELECT http_listen_host((SELECT address FROM listeners WHERE id = 1), 0);
SELECT http_listen_host('localhost:8000', 0);
SELECT http_listen_host('localhost:8000', 2);
SELECT (CASE WHEN http_listen_host('192.168.1.1:8080', 1) = 1 THEN 'Started' ELSE 'Stopped' END) AS status;
UPDATE listeners SET state = 1 WHERE address = '127.0.0.1:7780';
SELECT http_listen_host('127.0.0.1:7780', 0) AS stop_listener; SELECT http_listen_host('192.168.1.1:8080', 1) AS start_listener;
